sections.heading: What is a GPA Calculator?
sections.content: A GPA Calculator is a free online tool that helps students quickly and accurately calculate their Grade Point Average (GPA). By entering course grades and credit hours, it computes a weighted GPA and removes the chances of manual errors.

subSections.heading: Inputs Required
subSections.content: Letter grades for each course (A, B+, B, etc.), credit hours for each course, and optional grading scale selection.

subSections.heading: Calculation Method
subSections.content: The calculator converts each letter grade into grade points, multiplies them by credit hours, and divides the total grade points by total credits to compute weighted GPA.

subSections.heading: What Happens Next
subSections.content: After clicking Calculate, you instantly get your weighted GPA along with a clear breakdown of the calculation.

subSections.heading: Accurate GPA Estimation
subSections.content: Removes manual math errors and ensures correct GPA according to standard formulas.

subSections.heading: Multiple Course Support
subSections.content: Add as many courses as needed for a semester or full academic year.

subSections.heading: Cumulative GPA Tracking
subSections.content: Easily combine semester GPAs and credit hours to calculate total cumulative GPA.

subSections.heading: Easy Grade Planning
subSections.content: Simulate future grades to predict what GPA you need to reach your academic goals.

subSections.heading: Convenience
subSections.content: Fast, free, mobile-friendly, and works directly in your browser without installation.

subSections.heading: Example 1 – Single Semester
subSections.content: Course 1: A (4 credits), Course 2: B+ (3 credits), Course 3: B (3 credits). Result: Weighted GPA = 3.44.

subSections.heading: Example 2 – Cumulative GPA
subSections.content: Semester 1: GPA 3.5 (12 credits), Semester 2: GPA 3.8 (15 credits). Result: Cumulative GPA = 3.66.

faq.a: It calculates your GPA using letter grades and credit hours.
Yes, it is completely free to use online.

faq.q: Do I need to install software?
faq.a: No, you can use it directly in any web browser.
Yes, you can add as many courses as needed for an accurate GPA.

faq.q: Does it support different grading scales?
faq.a: Yes, although the default is the 4.0 scale.
Yes, by entering multiple semesters or sets of courses.
Yes, it works smoothly on smartphones, tablets, and desktops.

faq.q: Can it help with scholarship planning?
faq.a: Yes, it shows whether your GPA meets scholarship requirements.
It uses standard weighted GPA formulas, ensuring accurate results.
Yes, you can plan the grades needed to reach a target GPA.
